ogTitle: Campbells Pocket vs Campwin Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Campbells Pocket and Campwin Beach.
heading: Campbells Pocket vs Campwin Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Campbells Pocket, Queensland and Campwin Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Campwin Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Campbells Pocket (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Campbells Pocket or Campwin Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Campbells Pocket has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Campwin Beach scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Campbells Pocket scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Campwin Beach scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Campbells Pocket or Campwin Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Campwin Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
